revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月十八]][[zh:十二月十八]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 18|qq=December 18}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}. == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Senka|en|Emperor Senka|qid=Q329728|lt=Xuanhua Tennō|1=Emperor Senka}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|537|en|537|qid=Q31014|lt=537|1=537}} {{ill|January 14|en|January 14|qid=Q2257|lt=January 14|1=January 14}}) – The 28th emperor, {{ill|Emperor Senka|en|Emperor Senka|qid=Q329728|lt=Xuanhua Tennō|1=Emperor Senka}}, ascended the throne. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|qid=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}} {{ill|January 22|en|January 22|qid=Q2275|lt=January 22|1=January 22}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate confined {{ill|Watanabe Kazan|en|Watanabe Kazan|qid=Q3130609|lt=Watanabe Kasan|1=Watanabe Kazan}} and ordered {{ill|Takano Chōei|en|Takano Chōei|qid=Q944693|lt=Kōya Nagahide|1=Takano Chōei}} to remain in permanent imprisonment. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|January 27|en|January 27|qid=Q2284|lt=January 27|1=January 27}}) – The Kazoku and former samurai were granted permission to engage in agricultural, industrial, and commercial enterprises. == Births == * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1706|en|1706|qid=Q6835|lt=1706|1=1706}} {{ill|February 1|en|February 1|qid=Q2312|lt=February 1|1=February 1}}) – {{ill|Yamawaki Tōyō|ja|山脇東洋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamawaki Tōyō|1=Yamawaki Tōyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11470871}}, a physician and Japan's first recorded performer of human dissections (died {{ill|1762|en|1762|qid=Q7652|lt=1762|1=1762}}). * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1799|en|1799|qid=Q7827|lt=1799|1=1799}} {{ill|January 23|en|January 23|qid=Q2276|lt=January 23|1=January 23}}) – {{ill|Iida Tadayoshi|ja|飯田忠彦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iida Tadayoshi|1=Iida Tadahiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6535107}}, a Kokugakuist (died {{ill|1860|en|1860|qid=Q7691|lt=1860|1=1860}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1844|en|1844|qid=Q7633|lt=1844|1=1844}} {{ill|February 6|en|February 6|qid=Q2320|lt=February 6|1=February 6}}) – {{ill|Inoue Kowashi|en|Inoue Kowashi|qid=Q711131|lt=Inoue Tsuyoshi|1=Inoue Kowashi}}, a politician (died {{ill|1895|en|1895|qid=Q7844|lt=1895|1=1895}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1869, {{ill|January 30|en|January 30|qid=Q2287|lt=January 30|1=January 30}}) – {{ill|Nagai Dōmyō|ja|永井道明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagai Dōmyō|1=Michiakira Nagai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q62601383}}, a physical education scholar (died {{ill|1950|en|1950|qid=Q18597|lt=1950|1=1950}})<ref>{{cite book|和書|author=永井道明先生後援会|title=遺稿 永井道明自叙伝|publisher=大空社|series=伝記叢書 36|date=1988-03-17|page=91|qq=}}</ref>. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|February 7|en|February 7|qid=Q2322|lt=February 7|1=February 7}}) – {{ill|Kiyoshi Shiga|en|Kiyoshi Shiga|qid=Q562062|lt=Shiga Kiyoshi|1=Kiyoshi Shiga}}, a bacteriologist (died {{ill|1957|en|1957|qid=Q5311|lt=1957|1=1957}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1871, {{ill|February 7|en|February 7|qid=Q2322|lt=February 7|1=February 7}}) – {{ill|Togawa Akikotsu|ja|戸川秋骨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Togawa Akikotsu|1=Shūkotsu Togawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1457862}}, a critic and English literature scholar (died {{ill|1939|en|1939|qid=Q18639|lt=1939|1=1939}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Entoku|en|Entoku|qid=Q431465|lt=Entoku|1=Entoku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1491|en|1491|qid=Q6676|lt=1491|1=1491}} {{ill|January 27|en|January 27|qid=Q2284|lt=January 27|1=January 27}}) – {{ill|Hatakeyama Yoshinari|en|Hatakeyama Yoshinari|qid=Q11578676|lt=Hatakeyama Yoshinobu|1=Hatakeyama Yoshinari}}, a military commander (【ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将】). * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1673|en|1673|qid=Q7617|lt=1673|1=1673}} {{ill|February 4|en|February 4|qid=Q2318|lt=February 4|1=February 4}}) – {{ill|Hoshina Masayuki|en|Hoshina Masayuki|qid=Q837236|lt=Hoshina Masayuki|1=Hoshina Masayuki}}, the first lord of the Aizu Domain (born {{ill|1611|en|1611|qid=Q6768|lt=1611|1=1611}}). * {{ill|Anyō|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1193910}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1780|en|1780|qid=Q7716|lt=1780|1=1780}} {{ill|January 24|en|January 24|qid=Q2278|lt=January 24|1=January 24}}) – {{ill|Hiraga Gennai|en|Hiraga Gennai|qid=Q968242|lt=Hiraga Gennai|1=Hiraga Gennai}}, a Dutch studies scholar (born {{ill|1729|en|1729|qid=Q6952|lt=1729|1=1729}}). == Commemorations == {{Expand section|qq=}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|17|12|19|11|18|1|12|1218|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
